Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}All previously acquired Personas can be withdrawn and added to your Persona inventory. They can also be re-registered to the Compendium after leveling up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Note that there is a fee for withdrawing Personas, so keep an eye on your wallet.[n]{f 1 1}
